{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 2,
    "R1.7": 1,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The critique focuses on the accuracy of the grounding head and doesn't explicitly analyze evidence-claim alignment.",
    "R1.7": "There is no mention of specific citations or scholarship related to the work.",
    "RX.1": "The critique discusses the calibration of the grounding head but doesn't delve into specific instances where uncertainty is disclosed or not.",
    "RX.3": "The critique mentions a custom out-of-distribution dataset but doesn't explicitly assess whether the output covers exactly the agreed-upon active set.",
    "RX.4": "The critique highlights potential downstream harm avoidance by discussing agent failure modes, suggesting the output considers this aspect.",
    "RX.5": "The critique focuses on the method's design and evaluation but doesn't discuss provenance or traceability of changes in the output."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.7,
    "R1.7": 0.6,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.7,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.5
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The critique focuses on the accuracy of the grounding head and doesn't explicitly analyze evidence-claim alignment.
rationale.R1.7: There is no mention of specific citations or scholarship related to the work.
rationale.RX.1: The critique discusses the calibration of the grounding head but doesn't delve into specific instances where uncertainty is disclosed or not.
rationale.RX.3: The critique mentions a custom out-of-distribution dataset but doesn't explicitly assess whether the output covers exactly the agreed-upon active set.
rationale.RX.4: The critique highlights potential downstream harm avoidance by discussing agent failure modes, suggesting the output considers this aspect.
rationale.RX.5: The critique focuses on the method's design and evaluation but doesn't discuss provenance or traceability of changes in the output.
